channel.title: Integrations on OpenClaw Docker Blog
channel.description: Recent content in Integrations on OpenClaw Docker Blog

item.title: OpenClaw + Home Assistant Integration
item.description: OpenClaw + Home Assistant Integration OpenClaw can control your Home Assistant smart home devices through the Home Assistant skill. This integration lets you: Control lights, switches, and scenes Read sensor data (temperature, motion) Trigger automations Monitor device status Prerequisites Home Assistant running (HASS_SERVER) Long-lived access token from HA user profile OpenClaw with Home Assistant skill enabled Configuration Environment Variables Add these to your .env file: HASS_SERVER=http://10.0.0.114:8123 HA_TOKEN=eyJhbGciOiJIUzI1NiIsInR5cCI6IkpXVCJ9.your-token-here OpenClaw Configuration Edit openclaw.
